summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. All hydrated refs are open pull requests. The preflight artifact marks #75138 security_sensitive=false, but deterministic validation flagged that PR as security-sensitive because its body discusses API keys and GATEWAY_AUTH_TOKEN; per the security repair rule, that false preflight value cannot be overridden into route_security, so only #75138 is downgraded to non-mutating needs_human. No shared canonical exists, and merge/fix/raise_pr/post-merge close are blocked, so the remaining PRs are kept independent for normal maintainer review.
